Plaintiff Khosrow Jamshidi'S Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF KHOSROW JAMSHIDI'S PETITION TO VACATE ARBIRATION AWARD.
APPEARANCES: James S. Schreier, Esq., 310-553-3000 of Christensen, Miller, Fink, Jacobs, Glaser, Weil & Shapiro, LLP for Respondent and Opposing Party; Patrick Baldwin, Esq., 650-326-8195 for Petioner and Moving Party.
RULING: Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling - DENY - ARBITRATION PANELIST'S DENIAL OF PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY REQUEST NOT IMPROPER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/REQ/DM). Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647

Notice Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Nov-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS :
